commit.message:
Fix environment crash: switch from Observable @Environment(T.self) to custom EnvironmentKey

The @Environment(TaskStore.self) pattern (Observable-based) causes an
EXC_BREAKPOINT / SIGTRAP assertion failure in iOS 26 / Xcode 26 during
SwiftUI's first layout pass. Root cause is the Observable environment
lookup mechanism's instability under SWIFT_DEFAULT_ACTOR_ISOLATION=MainActor.

Fix: introduce a custom EnvironmentKey (TaskStoreKey) with a safe defaultValue,
expose it via EnvironmentValues.taskStore, inject it with
.environment(\.taskStore, taskStore) in DayFlowApp, and access it via
@Environment(\.taskStore) in all 7 consuming views/modifiers. This uses
the well-established EnvironmentKey mechanism, bypasses the buggy Observable
environment lookup path, and will never crash on startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add STACK - high score stacking game

Built precision timing arcade game where blocks slide and you tap to drop them. Perfect drops (+10 points) within 5px of center, blocks trim to overlap width, speed increases progressively. Game over on miss or overflow. High score tracking with localStorage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Save Draft functionality for vehicle inspections

Users can now save an in-progress inspection as a draft from the Review
step and resume it later from the homepage. Drafts are stored locally in
IndexedDB (works offline) with compressed photo blobs. Only one draft is
maintained at a time — saving a new draft overwrites any previous one.
Drafts are automatically deleted after successful submission or offline
queue save.

Changes:
- offlineDb.ts: IndexedDB v2 with new 'drafts' store, DraftFormState
  interface, saveDraft/getDraft/deleteDraft functions
- checklistStore.ts: loadFromDraft() action to restore draft into store
- ReviewStep.tsx: Save Draft button alongside Submit Inspection
- NewChecklistPage.tsx: draft save handler with photo compression, draft
  cleanup on submit, draft resume support via location state
- HomePage.tsx: draft card with Resume/Discard, draft-saved toast
- global.css: draft card styling (amber/orange theme)

commit.message:
fix: broadcast session_started event and fix query key invalidation (#18)

* fix: broadcast session_started event and fix query key invalidation mismatch

Two bugs prevented real-time UI updates across sessions, tasks, and archive:

1. spawnAndHandshake() never broadcast a session_started WebSocket event
   after creating a session, so other views never refreshed.

2. All query invalidation calls used no-arg key factories (e.g.
   sessionKeys.forTask(taskId)) which produced { includeArchived: undefined },
   but actual queries registered with { includeArchived: false }. TanStack
   Query's partialDeepEqual treats undefined !== false, so every invalidation
   silently failed.

Fix: Add broadcast call in acp.ts, add prefix key helpers to query.ts that
omit the includeArchived filter object, and use them in all invalidation
calls across ws-provider.tsx and tasks.$id.tsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: rename sessionKeys.listsPrefix to listPrefix for naming consistency

Aligns with the singular `list` function name in sessionKeys, matching
the review feedback about plural/singular inconsistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: integrate security hardening and performance improvements

- Add security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy)
- Add JWT token rotation with refresh token replay detection
- Add logout and revoke-all-sessions auth endpoints
- Add token blacklisting via Redis (JTI + global revocation)
- Harden CORS with explicit origin whitelist in production
- Optimize DB connection pool (pool_size=5, max_overflow=10, recycle/lifo)
- Add performance indexes migration for experiments, batch_runs, iterations
- Add Celery autoscale based on nproc with max-tasks-per-child
- Add frontend API calls for logout and session revocation
- Add 27 security tests (tokens, blacklisting, headers, rotation)

Integrates best code from review-echo-ai-soSFE and startup-code-audit-5C0mh
branches, with bug fixes for Alembic down_revision, CSP unsafe-eval removal,
and token type-guard preservation.

commit.message:
Fix tennis odds scraping: try summary page widget first

The tennis odds scraper was failing because it tried to navigate to the
odds-comparison tab, which may not exist or have a different structure
for tennis matches. FlashScore renders odds directly on the match
summary page in a div.odds widget with wcl-oddsCell buttons.

New two-tier approach:
1. First try the summary page odds widget (span[data-testid=wcl-oddsValue])
2. Fall back to the odds-comparison tab if the widget is absent

This fixes the "No valid initial odds yet" issue on ECS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TaskStore environment not found crash

Move .environment(taskStore) after .toastOverlay() so the injection
wraps both ContentView and ToastModifier. ViewModifier @Environment
properties resolve from the context *above* the modifier, so the
previous order placed ToastModifier outside the environment scope,
causing the 'No Observable object of type TaskStore found' fatal error.

Fix SurvivorAnims PBO double-prefix — pack from inside mod directory

Previous builds packed from the parent directory, causing file paths
like SurvivorAnims\SurvivorAnims\Scripts\... (double prefix). The
engine couldn't find scripts, causing full 4_World compile failure.
Now packing from inside the SurvivorAnims directory produces correct
single-prefix paths: SurvivorAnims\Scripts\3_Game\...

- Models: DFTask (Codable, computed time strings), TaskCategory, AppConfig (UserDefaults persistence)
- ViewModels: TaskStore (@Observable CRUD + conflict detection + notifications), VoiceRecognizer (Speech framework), OpenAIService (gpt-4o-mini voice parsing + prioritization)
- Views: SplashView (3s floating logo + pulsing dots), OnboardingView (2-step wake/bed picker), MainTabView (custom tab bar + FAB overlay), TodayView (score card + donut ring + task list), TimelineView (hourly scroll + mini calendar + date strip), AddTaskSheet (coral header + emoji picker + voice input + duration selector), SettingsView, AIView
- Components: ToastView (auto-dismiss overlay), CoralButton, SurfaceCard, CategoryPill
- Removes SwiftData dependency; replaces with UserDefaults + JSON

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add LLM-friendly error messages, hex literals, and CLAUDE.md template

Lexer: recognize && and || as error-recovery tokens, accept 0xFF hex literals
(auto-convert to decimal). Parser: detect common LLM mistakes (&&, ||, |x|
closure, let mut, fn without =, import {}) with actionable hints. Bundle
CLAUDE_TEMPLATE.md in almide init for AI-assisted development. Fix emit_ts
tests for v0.3.0 __almd_ naming. Add UFCS and init flag items to ROADMAP.

commit.message:
fix: prevent image over-zoom on laptop screens across entire project

- object-position: top center on all portrait photo images (mem-bg, receipt cards, all magazine frames, feature col, film strip, contact grid, birthday circle) so faces/subjects are always visible rather than cropping to mid-body
- Receipt cards switched from object-fit:cover to contain so full photos show without cropping (especially important for landscape photos like group shot)
- Large-screen media query (≥900px): constrain memories bg image to max 600px wide centered; reduce receipt deck sizing so cards don't get oversized
- Consistent rule applied identically in both samik-birthday-wrap.html (via style.css) and magazine.html

fix: rewire transcriber → GitHub inbox/ (Phase 3)

Replace Notion posting with GitHub Contents API. On completion,
the transcriber now writes a structured markdown file to inbox/
following the signal schema (YAML frontmatter + summary + transcript).

Flow: Audio → AssemblyAI → Claude → inbox/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md

- Removed: postToNotion, NOTION_DB_SIGNALS, Notion key in setup
- Added: postToGitHub using PUT /repos/{repo}/contents/inbox/{file}
- Signal files include: id, date_captured, source_type, submitted_by,
  protocol_stage, status, signal_type, tags, provenance, confidence,
  summary, key_quotes, full transcript

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Skip AnimSetInt on client to prevent crash from GetHealth01 memory corruption

The GetHealth01 error flood from Expansion AI corrupts engine memory
globally. Even the local player's AnimSetInt crashes on corrupted heap
data. Now we skip the facial animation (cosmetic only) on multiplayer
clients entirely, while keeping server-side processing intact.

commit.message:
fix: read org_id from URL param in project creation handler

PostRequest previously required organization_id as a body field, but
the BFF only sends name/slug/description — org_id is already in the
URL as {org_id}. Removed the redundant body field and updated the
handler to use requtil.ParseUUID(r, "org_id") instead. Tests updated
to inject org_id as a chi URL param and cover both missing and invalid
param cases.

docs: add 5W1H logging policy and update dev env var docs in CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Codex provider: enable file writes with workspace-write sandbox mode

The Codex SDK defaults to read-only sandbox mode, which prevented it from
writing or editing files. Added sandboxMode: 'workspace-write' and
approvalPolicy: 'never' to the thread options.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: inject dev env vars in make run-api and run-web targets

make run-api and run-all were missing DEV_BYPASS_RBAC, so RBAC
middleware rejected every BFF request with 401 when running locally
outside Docker (compose.override.yaml only applies inside containers).

- run-api / run-all: pass DEV_BYPASS_RBAC=true to go run so all RBAC
  role checks are bypassed in the local dev environment
- run-web / run-all: pass API_AUTH_TOKEN=dev-token to go run so the
  BFF sends a valid Bearer header without manual env setup

No code changes — only Makefile recipe env var placement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: bump version to 0.1.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: detect PHP in versioned directories on Windows

PHP from windows.php.net extracts to versioned directories like
php-8.4.16-Win32-vs17-x64/. Updated detect_php_binary and
detect_php_ext_dir to search for these versioned directories.

This fixes "PHP exited immediately" error when runtime is installed
to custom locations like C:\CAMPP.
